languages.text: "Когда мы вернемся на мой корабль, тебя ждет серьезный разговор с Мастером Дисциплины и ее силовой дубинкой".

traits.locale_text: не царское это дело ножками идти

languages.text: "When we return to my ship, you will be having a serious chat with the Master-at-Arms and her power maul."
languages.original_text: "Когда мы вернемся на мой корабль, тебя ждет серьезный разговор с Мастером Дисциплины и ее силовой дубинкой".

traits.locale_text: "When we return to my ship, you will be having a serious chat with the Master-at-Arms and her power maul."
"When we return to my ship, you will be having a serious chat with the Master-at-Arms and her power maul."
"When we return to my ship, you will be having a serious chat with the Master-at-Arms and her power maul."

languages.text: 「わたしの船に戻ったら、あなたは軍需官と彼女の強力なマウルで真剣な話し合いをすることになる」
languages.original_text: "When we return to my ship, you will be having a serious chat with the Master-at-Arms and her power maul."

traits.locale_text: 「わたしの船に戻ったら、あなたは軍需官と彼女の強力なマウルで真剣な話し合いをすることになるわ。」

languages.text: «Cuando volvamos a la nave, hablará largo y tendido con la maestra de armas y su maza de energía».
languages.original_text: "When we return to my ship, you will be having a serious chat with the Master-at-Arms and her power maul."

traits.locale_text: «Cuando volvamos a la nave, hablará largo y tendido con la maestra de armas y su maza de energía».

languages.text: “等回到船上，跟戒律大师谈谈——顺便见识下她的能量锤。”
languages.original_text: "When we return to my ship, you will be having a serious chat with the Master-at-Arms and her power maul."

traits.locale_text: “等回到船上，跟戒律大师谈谈——顺便见识下她的能量锤。”

languages.text: "Sobald wir wieder auf meinem Schiff sind, werdet Ihr ein erstes Gespräch mit der Waffenmeisterin und ihrem Energiestreitkolben führen."
languages.original_text: "When we return to my ship, you will be having a serious chat with the Master-at-Arms and her power maul."

traits.locale_text: "Sobald wir wieder auf meinem Schiff sind, werdet Ihr ein erstes Gespräch mit der Waffenmeisterin und ihrem Energiestreitkolben führen."

languages.text: "Gemime döndüğümüzde Silahtar ve onun güç gürzüyle ciddi bir sohbet edeceksin."
languages.original_text: "When we return to my ship, you will be having a serious chat with the Master-at-Arms and her power maul."

traits.locale_text: "Gemime döndüğümüzde Silahtar ve onun güç gürzüyle ciddi bir sohbet edeceksin."

languages.text: « Quand nous retournerons à bord de mon vaisseau, attendez-vous à une discussion avec la capitaine d'armes et sa masse énergétique. »
languages.original_text: "When we return to my ship, you will be having a serious chat with the Master-at-Arms and her power maul."

traits.locale_text: « Quand nous retournerons à bord de mon vaisseau, attendez-vous à une discussion avec la capitaine d'armes et sa masse énergétique. »
